name: SuggestedPostPaid
description: Describes a service message about a successful payment for a suggested post.

rows.description: Optional . Message containing the suggested post. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain the reply_to_message field even if it itself is a reply.
Currency in which the payment was made. Currently, one of “XTR” for Telegram Stars or “TON” for toncoins
Optional . The amount of the currency that was received by the channel in nanotoncoins; for payments in toncoins only
Optional . The amount of Telegram Stars that was received by the channel; for payments in Telegram Stars only
